Resolves \<#Issue-Number\>

**PR Type**
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI/Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security

## Requirement Description

*\<A clear & concise description of what changes were made
AND why those changes were made/needed\>*

## Architecture Changes

*\<Describe any structural changes to the website, repository workflow, or code organization.\>*

Examples:
- Added or removed pages, components, layouts, or shared UI sections
- Changed responsibilities between `app/`, `components/`, `lib/`, or `.github/` files
- Reorganized routes, navigation, or content structure
- Updated CI, issue templates, PR templates, or repository automation

*\<If no structural changes were made, write N/A.\>*

## Behavior Changes

*\<Describe how runtime behavior or user-visible behavior changed.\>*

Examples:
- Changed navigation behavior or page flow
- Updated docs interactions or page content behavior
- Modified responsive behavior or layout rendering
- Changed validation, messaging, or error handling
- Updated CI or repository workflow behavior

*\<If no behavioral changes were made, write N/A.\>*

**Diagrams:**

*\<If this PR changes structure, page flow, or workflow behavior in a meaningful way, link updated diagrams here.\>*

Example:
- N/A

or

- Updated component diagram:
- Updated page flow diagram:
- Updated workflow diagram:

**Tests / Validation**

*\<Describe how the changes were tested.\>*

Examples:
- `npm run build`
- `npm run lint`
- Manual check of `/`, `/docs`, and `/about`
- Verified GitHub Actions or issue template behavior

## Screenshots / Visual Evidence

*\<For UI, layout, or docs changes, include screenshots if helpful. If not applicable, write N/A.\>*

## PR Review Checklist

If a box cannot be checked, explain why an exception should be made.

### Issue & Scope
- [ ] PR links to a relevant open issue
- [ ] PR contributes toward resolving the linked issue
- [ ] PR is small, focused, and limited in scope

### Design & Architecture
- [ ] Relevant diagrams or workflow references were updated if needed
- [ ] Structural and behavioral changes are documented in this PR

### Testing & Validation
- [ ] New or modified code includes appropriate tests or validation
- [ ] Existing checks still pass
- [ ] CI passes successfully
- [ ] The website or workflow was tested manually after changes
- [ ] Validation confidence was maintained or improved

### Code Quality
- [ ] Added code uses clear naming and appropriate documentation
- [ ] Comments and documentation are accurate and useful
- [ ] AI-assisted/generated code was reviewed, validated, and documented appropriately

### Exceptions

If any checklist item could not be completed, explain why below.

*\<Explain exceptions here.\>*
